image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about healthy user bias than social media does.
Context visual: Healthy user bias suggests that people who engage in health behaviors often report better health outcomes.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But hold on! Not all studies agree.
Escalation visual: Some research shows that this bias could inflate the perceived benefits of healthy habits.
Evidence visual: In fact, individuals who are already healthy are more likely to seek out health information.
Payoff visual: So, while healthy user bias exists, the story is complex and requires careful interpretation.
Cta visual: Curious about more science insights? Hit that follow button!
